# ResuMetric | Enterprise Profile Analytics

ResuMetric is a high-performance AI resume ATS analyzer for career intelligence and profile optimization.

## Key Capabilities
- Neural Resume Analysis via Gemini LLM.
- ATS Visual Simulation and Recruiter Bias Emulation.
- Keyword Gap Identification and Industry Benchmarking.
- Heatmap Performance Visualization.
- Automated Resume Revision Engine.
- Professional PDF Diagnostic Reports.

## Technical Specifications
- Engine: Gemini 1.5 Flash.
- Security: ISO-Aligned Data Purge (3600s TTL).
- Architecture: Node.js / React / MongoDB.

## API Endpoints
- POST /api/analyze: Primary diagnostic ingestion.
- POST /api/rewrite: LLM-driven copy optimization.
- POST /api/report: PDF diagnostic synthesis.
- GET /api/health: System operational check.
